slack.title: Slack
slack.needsAuth: Add a Slack user token and pick a workspace in Settings
slack.needsUserToken: Slack search needs a user token (xoxp-) with search:read; the configured token is not a user token
slack.noUserId: Slack auth.test did not return a user id; re-check the token
slack.hintMissingScope: Slack token is missing the search:read scope; add it and reinstall the app
slack.hintNotUserToken: Slack search needs a user token (xoxp-); the configured token type cannot search
slack.hintInvalidToken: Slack token is invalid or expired; paste a fresh user token in Settings
slack.hintAccountInactive: The Slack account for this token is deactivated
